system.description:
Sometimes used by Space Marine Scout Squads in the field, a grapnel fires a hooked or magnetic grapnel from a bolt pistol, connected to the launcher with a thin but strong 100m wire. Once the grapnel attaches to the desired rock outcropping, gargoyle edifice or other anchor, the user can manually climb the line or activate a powered winch.

In a pinch, a grapnel can also be used as a crude—and messy—projectile weapon, doing 1d10+2 R Damage with a Penetration of 2.
